title: Support - App, user not logged ever, no data
scenario: Support section shows "None" for Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID, and "Unknown" for Last Connected when accessed as a Guest user after onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. On the onboarding screen, select "Later" or skip login to proceed as a Guest (not logged in).
3. Once on the Home screen, tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
5. Observe the Support section details: App version, App ID, Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected.
expected: For a Guest user (not logged in), the Support section should display the App version and App ID correctly. Tenant name, Tenant ID, and User ID should show as "N/A" or be hidden/omitted since the user is not associated with any tenant. Last Connected should show "N/A" or a reasonable default value.
